untranslatable_reason: KST (Know Sure Thing) indicator is not in the allowed indicator list. KST is a custom momentum oscillator combining multiple ROC periods. MACD was substituted as a proxy trend-following oscillator. The 12-period trendline cannot be directly expressed as a single allowed indicator—sma_12 was used as a reasonable approximation. ROC_period and KST_period specifics are AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be precisely implemented.
translation_notes: Signal is trend-following with context-dependent direction (long or short based on trendline direction). KST signal crossover modeled using MACD crossover (both momentum-based trend indicators). Price confirmation uses SMA_12 as trendline proxy. Weekly data preference noted but implementation is timeframe-agnostic. Exit uses reversal condition (MACD crossover opposite entry direction) since AUTHOR_SILENT.
